# Workbook parity matrix

Inventory of workbook-contract surfaces vs Python calculator output vs server-rendered UI.
**Status values:** `present` | `hidden` | `misleading` | `not_applicable`

Phase 3 (labels, receipts, charts) addresses UI honesty gaps **B1–B7** and **A5**; this matrix documents current state only.

| id | workbook_cell | python_field / path | ui_surface | status | notes |
|----|---------------|---------------------|------------|--------|-------|
| B28 | Dashboard `B28` | `dashboard.year10Roi` | Workbench — Year 10 ROI metric (`tenYear` evidence layer, solver metric option) | present | Workbook ROI: `(netProceeds + L16 - initialInvestment) / initialInvestment`; **excludes** reserve addback `L15`. |
| L17 | 10-Year Pro Forma `L17` | `proForma[10].realEstateLiquidationWealth` | Workbench — 10-Year chart series + evidence table column | present | Liquidation wealth = accumulated operating cash + net proceeds + reserve at sale; **includes** `L15` addback. |
| A4 | — (no workbook fixture rows) | `result.repairReservePathTrace`, `proForma[].reserveEndingBalance`, `sellNowWealth`, `earningsSoFar` | Workbench — Repair Fund layer + 10-Year chart honest lines | present | **App-owned calculation truth** (`decision_id` `repair_reserve_path_trace_workbook_vs_teaching`). Real reserve with repair draws feeds `sellNowWealth` and `earningsSoFar`; smooth `accumulatedCapexReserve` + L17 stay workbook-parity (17-case gate). Proof: `tests/test_reserve_timeline_truth.py`, `tests/test_repair_reserve_path_trace.py`. |
| A5 | — | `solve_rental_capex` / `solver.*` cases | Decision step — solver workbench (variable, metric, bounds, preview) + `whatWorks` thresholds | present | **App-side regression only** (`fixtureContract.solverCasePolicy`). Phase 3 Slice 6: `solverDisclaimer` on workbench + `whatWorks` trace; decision-step `#solver-workbench`, preview footnote, and layer copy state not workbook-canonical. |
| A3 | extraction artifact | `tests/fixtures/spreadsheet-defaults.json` | none | not_applicable | Provenance/regen only (**Option A**): regenerate via `tools/generate-verification-fixtures.mjs` after `analysis/parity-v2/extract_xlsx_inventory.py`. **Not executed in CI** at Phase 1 closeout (human decision 2026-06-04). |
| B1 | `B23`–`B26` (sale bridge) + `L15`/`L16` | `dashboard.futurePropertyValueYear10`, `remainingLoanBalanceYear10`, `costOfSaleYear10`, `netProceedsYear10`, `proForma[10].accumulatedTrueCashFlow`, `proForma[10].accumulatedCapexReserve` | Workbench — `tenYear` evidence summary receipts | present | Phase 3 Slice 2: `browser_app_contracts._ten_year_sale_bridge_receipts` → `_trace_receipt_cards` in `htmx_renderer._ten_year_section`. |
| B2 | `B28` vs `L17` | `dashboard.year10Roi` vs `proForma[10].realEstateLiquidationWealth` | Workbench — `tenYear` summary dual-label cards + metric guidance | present | Phase 3 Slice 3: `browser_app_contracts._ten_year_trace` summary + `METRIC_GUIDANCE` / `SOLVER_METRICS` B28 copy; B28 excludes L15, L17 includes. |
| B3 | Chart vs table cash position | `initialInvestment + proForma[].accumulatedTrueCashFlow` | Workbench — 10-Year evidence table cash-position column (table-only) | present | Chart now uses `sellNowWealth` + `earningsSoFar`; cash position stays table-only on L16 + initial. |
| B4 | Cash-flow chart semantics | `graph.series` ids `sellNow`, `earnings` | Workbench — 10-Year chart legend + trace note | present | Replaced cash-position chart series with honest sell-now and earnings lines from core pro forma fields. |
| B5 | Dashboard `B40` | `dashboard.trueMonthlyCashFlow` | Workbench — `cashFlow` evidence receipt, layer copy, metric guidance | present | Phase 3 Slice 4: B40 labeled as dashboard underwriting snapshot; full monthly reserve every month; post-cap path via pro forma L16 / tenYear. |
| B6 | Sinking fund `B34` / cap `B21` | `dashboard.totalMonthlyCapexReserve`, pro forma contributions | Repair Fund layer subtitle / cards | present | Phase 3 Slice 5: cap-aware chart subtitle, B34 summary card, info/trace copy; distinguishes dashboard rate from post-cap zero contribution years. |
| B7 | Pro forma reserve + sale rows | `annualCapexContribution`, `accumulatedCapexReserve`, sale bridge per year | 10-Year evidence table | present | Phase 3 Slice 3: `htmx_renderer._ten_year_section` exposes L15/L16, B23–B26, and L17 column on all pro forma rows. |
| B20 | Dashboard `B20` | `input.reserveAccountApy` | Loan Terms journey — Repair fund APY field | present | Phase 4 Slice 2: `browser_app_contracts` loan stage exposes editable control; calculator already consumes for PMT, cap timing, and pro forma interest. |
| — | — (app-only inputs) | `input.emergencyLoanApr`, `input.emergencyLoanTermYears` | Loan Terms journey — emergency loan fields | present | Phase 4 Slice 2: defaults `0.125` / `5` in `default-deal-inputs.json`; `core.deal_inputs` validates. Phase 5 Slice 2: calculator consumes via `core.emergency_debt_ledger` on teaching `repairReservePathTrace` — **not** workbook-canonical; no 17-case parity rows. |
| C1 | Dashboard `B25` | `input.monthlyUtilitiesLandlordPaid` | Loan Terms journey — Monthly landlord-paid utilities field | present | Phase 4 Slice 3: `browser_app_contracts` loan stage after `hoaFeesMonthly`; calculator already in `totalMonthlyFixedExpenses`. |
| C2 | Dashboard `B28` | `input.legalProfessionalAnnual` | Walkthrough journey — Annual legal and professional field | present | Phase 4 Slice 3: walkthrough stage after `cleaningMaintenanceAnnual`; annual cost / 12 in operating stack. |
| C3 | Dashboard `B29` | `input.advertisingLeasingAnnual` | Walkthrough journey — Annual advertising and leasing field | present | Phase 4 Slice 3: walkthrough stage after `legalProfessionalAnnual`; annual cost / 12 in operating stack. |
| R1 | — (app-only) | `result.emergencyDebtLedger` | Stakeholder dossier — debt-shock trail; offer-ready references ledger summary | present | Phase 5 Slice 2: `core/emergency_debt_ledger.py`; chronological gaps, consolidated refi, single payment stream. Proof: `tests/test_emergency_debt_ledger.py`. Not workbook-canonical. |
| R2 | — (app-only) | `result.shockAdjustedCashFlow`, `shockSurvival.shockAdjustedCashFlow` | Calculator contract + offer-ready survival headline | present | Phase 5 Slice 3: worst-month shock-adjusted cash flow; wired to survival rule. Proof: `tests/test_shock_survival.py`, `tests/test_calculator_resilience_contract.py`. Not in 17-case parity. |
| R3 | — (app-only) | `result.shockSurvival` | Offer-ready + dossier survival framing | present | Phase 5 Slice 3: survival rule (`shockAdjustedCashFlow >= 0` AND `trueMonthlyCashFlow >= minimumTrueMonthlyCashFlow`). Proof: `tests/test_shock_survival.py`, `tests/test_calculator_resilience_contract.py`. |
| R4 | — (app-only) | `result.overlapDetected`, `emergencyDebtLedger.overlapDetected` | Offer-ready short warning; dossier full overlap trail | present | Phase 5 Slices 1+4: new gap during active emergency payments — warning only, not survival fail; clears on walkthrough component-age reset. Proof: `tests/test_emergency_debt_ledger.py`, `tests/test_presentation_htmx_renderer.py`. |
| R5 | — (app-only) | `input.minimumTrueMonthlyCashFlow` | Walkthrough / loan journey — user cash-flow floor | present | Phase 5 Slice 1: default `0`; validated in `core.deal_inputs`. Survival contract uses floor vs `dashboard.trueMonthlyCashFlow`. Proof: `tests/test_deal_input_round_trip.py`, `tests/test_calculator_resilience_contract.py`. |
| R6 | — (app-only) | `solve_reserve_first_shortfall` / `reserveIncreaseFirstShortfall` | Offer-ready reserve-increase solver section | present | Phase 5 Slice 7: bisects first `y>=2` `emergencyGap` only; explicit apply; does **not** clear overlap. Proof: `tests/test_reserve_first_shortfall_solver.py`. |
| R7 | — (app-only) | teaching `cash_flow_stability_evidence` | Stakeholder dossier — planned reserve vs debt-shock paths | present | Phase 5 Slice 5: `teaching_display_plan/cash_flow_stability_evidence.py`. Proof: `tests/test_cash_flow_stability_evidence.py`, `tests/test_offer_ready_evidence.py`. |

## Related proof

- **17-case gate:** `python -m unittest tests.test_fixture_parity` (5 calculation + 12 `solver.*` app regression). Legacy: `python -m capex3.rental_capex_calculator.fixture_parity`.
- **Pro forma contract:** `python -m unittest tests.test_pro_forma_fixture_contract` (calculation cases years 0–10).

See [`README.md`](README.md) for workbook-canonical vs app-only policy and file roles.
